name: drift-detect emits a structured action-card with rule_id, old_hash, new_hash, suggested_action
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/drift-detect.sh" --rule-file "$PWD/rule.yaml" --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --format json 2>cards.txt && grep -E "\"suggested_action\":\"refetch\"" cards.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:OLD
rules: []
' > rule.yaml
